name: assign-tasks-endpoint-success
description: Validates that the /assign-tasks endpoint successfully assigns tasks to employees when provided with valid input.
input: POST request to /assign-tasks with a valid JSON body containing at least one task and one employee with matching skills and sufficient capacity.
output: JSON response with success=true, assignments list, utilization summary, and unassigned_tasks (possibly empty).
success_criteria: response contains 'assignments' as a non-empty list
error_scenarios: API returns 500 due to internal error
API returns 422 due to validation error
